current_judgment: The codebase still has large-file debt, but the inspection found and fixed two concrete lies in the current code: duplicated frontend vision contracts and fake persistence that never read stored state, plus repeated reranker scaffolding inside the largest retrieval runtime test file.
key_evidence: Added a shared frontend wiki vision contract and persistence helpers so both pages read the same mode metadata and actually restore stored `wikiVisionMode` instead of always forcing `atlas_canvas`.
Added `presentation-ui/src/lib/wikiVision.test.ts`, increasing the frontend vitest suite from 6 to 9 passing tests and locking valid-mode fallback behavior.
Moved repeated fake reranker support into `tests/_support_retrieval.py` and removed seven inline reranker/retriever class copies from `tests/test_retrieval_runtime.py`.
Post-validation hygiene cleanup removed 11 regenerated junk targets totaling 1486124 bytes and restored `workspace_junk_count` to 0.
validation_results: npm --prefix presentation-ui run test -> 3 files, 9 tests passed

.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_retrieval_runtime.py -q -k "reranker_rebalances_cluster_node_usage_back_to_support_family or reranker_rebalances_generic_intro_back_to_intro_overview or reranker_rebalances_etcd_backup_hits_toward_backup_procedure or reranker_rescues_uploaded_customer_pack_for_explicit_customer_doc_query or reranker_keeps_etcd_backup_companion_when_rerank_returns_only_postinstall_hits or reranker_replaces_restore_companion_with_backup_companion_for_etcd_backup_query or reranker_rebalances_certificate_monitor_query_back_to_cli_or_security" -> 7 passed, 29 deselected
next_action: The next code-inspection cut should attack oversized tracked files directly: split `tests/test_retrieval_runtime.py` into domain-focused suites so full-file validation no longer exceeds 300s, then split `presentation-ui/src/pages/WorkspacePage.tsx` and `PlaybookLibraryPage.tsx` by extracted view-model helpers and presentational sections.
